## Log (REQUIRED)

Attach `D:\Anomaly\appdata\logs\alifebalance.log` and `xray_<user>.log`.
Without these the report will likely be closed unactioned.

**Enable debug logging first, then reproduce:**
1. Main menu -> Mod Configuration Menu -> AlifeBalance -> set `log_level` to `DEBUG`
2. Save, load your save
3. Reproduce the bug
4. Attach the log

## Screenshots / video (optional)
